rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-820; Improvement for spec rollout, driver not doing anything wrong.

I/O timeout regression bug in cursor reading; no specific spec rule violated.

ChangeStream omits LatencySelector unlike all other operations; contradicts server-selection spec's composite selector requirement.
API input validation bug: bson.D accepted as pipeline when it shouldn't be; internal type check issue, no spec rule.
Race condition in connection staleness check; internal concurrency bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Security CVE dependency update for golang.org/x/crypto; no driver behavior or spec involved.
Build/packaging failure with go install on Go 1.17+; no spec involvement.
Static analysis linter issues; code quality cleanup with no spec behavior change.

Improvement to error early when insufficient time remains for socket operation; performance/reliability, no spec rule.

Feature request to add pretty-print Extended JSON functions; no spec behavior involved.

Adding index fields to IndexSpecification; empty description, Improvement with no spec violation indicated.

Atomic alignment fix for topology.Server struct; internal Go concurrency correctness, no spec involvement.

Bug in srvMaxHosts shuffle logic that can lose SRV records; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Connection pool idle timeout improvement for reducing churn; performance feature, no spec rule.
